tools.name: search_docs
tools.title: Search Documentation
tools.description: Search documentation with hybrid semantic (vector) and keyword (BM25) search. Use semanticWeight to choose keyword-only (0), semantic-only (1), or a blend; mid values fuse rankings with RRF. Supports Tiger Cloud (TimescaleDB), PostgreSQL, and PostGIS.

source.description: The documentation source to search. "tiger" for Tiger Cloud and TimescaleDB, "postgres" for PostgreSQL, "postgis" for PostGIS spatial extension. Specific versions provided with _X.X suffixes.

query.description: The search query. Used for BM25 when keyword or hybrid search applies, and for the embedding when semantic or hybrid search applies.

limit.description: The maximum number of matches to return. Defaults to 20.

semanticWeight.description: Controls the balance between semantic and keyword search. 0 = keyword only, 0.5 = equal mix, 1 = semantic only. Default is 0.7 (favor semantic search).

id.description: The unique identifier of the documentation entry.

content.description: The content of the documentation entry.

metadata.description: Additional metadata about the documentation entry, as a JSON encoded string.

distance.description: The distance score indicating the relevance of the entry to the query. Lower values indicate higher relevance.

id.description: The unique identifier of the documentation entry.

content.description: The content of the documentation entry.

metadata.description: Additional metadata about the documentation entry, as a JSON encoded string.

score.description: The score indicating the relevance of the entry to the keywords. Higher values indicate higher relevance.

id.description: The unique identifier of the documentation entry.

content.description: The content of the documentation entry.

metadata.description: Additional metadata about the documentation entry, as a JSON encoded string.

rrf_score.description: Hybrid search: fused RRF score from combining semantic and keyword result rankings.

tools.name: view_skill
tools.title: View Skill
tools.description:
Retrieve detailed skills for TimescaleDB operations and best practices.

## Available Skills

<available_skills>
[]
</available_skills>

skill_name.description: The name of the skill to browse, or `.` to list all available skills.

path.description:
A relative path to a file or directory within the skill to view.
If empty, will view the `SKILL.md` file by default.
Use `.` to list the root directory of the skill.

content.description: The content of the file or directory listing.
